text.message: Red. It was really hard to ignore that 8-4
Didn't want to ruin your game
don't think u would have ruined his game lol
Thought u were gonna take it for sure
yeah u probably should have taken it lol
Green. Honestly vro. Greed won't help you
I don't know why 2:1 is so important for you
It’s not mandatory for you to trade
i think green might just win with road
I’m a long way from here
I can ignore once or twice. You always propose an irrational trade and then propose the original trade in your turn lol
Red will win if not you
I can’t ask 2 for 1 in my turn
didn't want to get pre if i'm gonna steal it
your gonna take road and it's over
Oj you sitting on 2 vps. How can you fumble the maths
we weren't winning unless he sevens out genius
